categories.label: Elder Signs Collected
categories.description: Number of elder sign tokens placed next to the Ancient One card. Track progress toward the Elder Sign limit.

categories.label: Doom Tokens on Track
categories.description: Number of doom tokens on the Ancient One's doom track. Each token brings the Ancient One closer to awakening.

categories.label: Investigators Devoured
categories.description: Number of investigators devoured during the game. Each devouring also adds 1 doom token.

categories.label: Adventures Completed
categories.description: Total adventure cards successfully resolved by the team.

categories.label: Monsters Defeated
categories.description: Total monster markers whose tasks were completed by the team.

categories.label: Trophies Held
categories.description: Adventure cards and monster markers currently held as unspent trophies.

categories.label: Midnights Survived
categories.description: Number of times midnight struck and a Mythos card was drawn. Tracks game length and pacing.

categories.label: Game Result
categories.description: Cooperative outcome: Win (sealed Ancient One or defeated in battle) or Loss (all investigators devoured).
